status_vocabulary.passed: Independent evidence satisfies the requirement at the declared machine or full-programme milestone.
status_vocabulary.produced: A foundation artefact exists, but its release acceptance gate has not been passed.
status_vocabulary.in_progress: Implementation or evidence remains incomplete for the release contract.
status_vocabulary.blocked: The remaining work requires authority that has not been granted.
status_vocabulary.accepted: The task contract promotion gate has passed with terminal evidence for the declared milestone.

requirement_status_groups.name: fixture_profile_and_discovery_foundation
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The semantic, publication, Explorer and read-only discovery foundations run against a representative fixture. A lazy sitemap/routing control plane now accounts for every observed host and record in the compiled snapshot, preserves complete source-native redirect fields per record, and exposes boundary sites without implying they are complete mirrors. The static-search contract preserves two-character logical lookup while exact-byte physical postings partitions and 1,000-record document-map shards keep the 5 MiB budget; validator, Explorer and Python discovery retain legacy singleton compatibility and fail closed on declared contract drift. A failure-shaped 2,048-record skew regression proves deterministic split routing and release-pack collection. The no-skip real-Chromium browser gate passes locally and in protected pull-request CI for accessibility-relevant behaviour, deep links, Pages fallback, gzip and budgets. Axe, accessibility-expert, screen-reader, participant and exact full-corpus evidence remain pending.

requirement_status_groups.name: official_source_audit_foundation
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The dated public-source audit and preflight exist. The fixture rights/privacy scan has zero hard body/credential findings and two policy-controlled structural review triggers, but it does not substitute for T0/T1 source-union closure, the final snapshot-bound rights scan, or citation verification.

requirement_status_groups.name: persona_and_story_design_foundation
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The machine-applicable persona gate passes for 48 evidenced research hypotheses, 17 cross-cutting overlays, 11 required dimensions, all 83 pinned schema families, exhaustive 136-pair overlay scenarios, five high-risk t-way scenarios and two successive held-out no-new challenge passes. One genuine omission, privacy-sensitive context, was added as a contract-supported hypothesis. Human validation remains not authorised, evidence claim-support verification remains an F2 dependency, and the six release-v2 stories per persona must still be regenerated against the final snapshot; no UI preference claim is made.

requirement_status_groups.name: deterministic_execution_foundation
requirement_status_groups.qualification: Deterministic orchestration, bounded contracts, a hash-chained append-only activity contract, separate product/paid-API/source-request accounting, explicit access fallbacks, zero-paid-model policy, locked-dependency SBOM and isolated fixture reproduction exist. Candidate promotion and post-publication finalization are now ledger-locked, rollback-safe and replay-safe, and bind frozen source, compiler, generation time, bundle tree, tests, SBOM and immutable clean-room inputs. A completed repository-wide Codex Security campaign records 14 original findings, three residual low findings and their remediation at commit 27890dc; 32 focused post-fix tests pass. Release provenance now requires distinct ACT-F2-RELEASE-SNAPSHOT-CITATION-REVIEWS-TERMINAL-001 and ACT-D2-RELEASE-SNAPSHOT-SECURITY-SCAN-TERMINAL-001 entries that supersede the fixture/pre-release terminals, name the exact release snapshot and hash-bind their required release outputs. All nine post-closing terminal declarations require the exact release snapshot; the two opening T0 declarations remain T0-bound. This is pre-release evidence only: T0 hydration, T1/closing, evaluation, final-snapshot citation/security work, publication, independent adjudication and full-snapshot clean-room terminal evidence remain release work.

requirement_status_groups.name: full_corpus_and_capacity
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The unsampled T0 union census is closed and integrity-checked: 848,977 candidate keys, 836,998 publication records, 137 opposing-pass Search partitions, 35 byte-stable sitemap shards, closed organisations/navigation, six redirects and zero unexplained omissions. The topology contract can project that admitted source union into hosts, canonical routes, stable identifiers, redirects, boundary destinations and typed routing relationships, but the checked-in bundle remains a fixture and no T0 preview is a release claim. A 75,000-page deterministic rendered-link detector preserves the shared request reserve. The resumable hydrator derives and enforces the launch-manifest 10 GiB retained-metadata ceiling, durably spools successful responses before database admission, reserves every SQLite and export write before mutation, rejects duplicate source identities and path escapes, and verifies durable exports before transient cleanup. The first exact T0 capacity build ran 44,342.28 seconds and failed closed when the ca postings file reached 6,712,946 bytes against 5,242,880. ADR-006 now deterministically partitions complete tokens by exact physical bytes and chunks the document map without changing logical lookup; fast skew, legacy, tamper, discovery and packaging tests pass. Repository-native publication packages virtual shards into bounded, dual-hash, same-origin Pages .pack.gz ranges, mirrors identical assets in a draft-first immutable Release transaction, verifies live byte ranges, and fails closed at 950,000,000 Pages bytes. Capacity remains unresolved until the exact T0 rerun and hydrated closing artifact measure every remaining shard and pack. T0 hydration, T1 re-enumeration, closing delta and final zero-omission release reconciliation remain in progress.

requirement_status_groups.name: release_question_matrix
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The corpus-anchored v2 generator and separate verifier exist. They have not run against a complete release snapshot; the checked-in v1 matrix is development-only and cannot pass the question gate.

requirement_status_groups.name: evaluation_comparison_and_assessment
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The deterministic matched evaluation harness, baselines, ablations, trace shards, metrics, cluster confidence intervals, slices and failure analysis are implemented and fixture-tested. The GOV.UK Chat comparator assets retain replayable prompts, structured source-card metadata and explicit rights dispositions: linked sources remain links, the observed screenshot bytes are not retained or published, and any longer answer or copied image requires item-level review. Those dispositions are conservative evidence controls, not legal or licence-verification conclusions. A deterministic nine-aim assessment maps all 95 requirements and 21 controlling clauses to exact hashed evidence, negative findings, exceptions and next actions; it honestly reports eight partly fulfilled aims and one not yet testable aim while Gate 11 remains pending. The complete 28,800-question release run and participant results remain outstanding.

requirement_status_groups.name: citation_and_research_verification
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The source preflight covers 32/32 official and 93/93 plan URLs while preserving superseded access failures. The deterministic inventory now covers 128 claims, 196 citation bindings and 111 sources, including every source-page, source-image, official-context, question, bounded excerpt, structured-summary sentence and ordered source-card object in the GOV.UK Chat JSON comparator assets with exact JSON Pointers. Screenshot-derived fields bind the expected binary digest; each ordered source-card claim jointly binds the screenshot and destination, while duplicate, gapped or out-of-order positions fail closed. The previously frozen fixture evidence still passes 160 bindings and 40 joint claims; 36 new or changed bindings and four joint claims are deliberately blocking because they have not yet received fresh claim-specific evidence and independent semantic-support review. No waiver converts that missing verification into a pass. The full inventory, evidence and reviews must be regenerated against the final closing snapshot before publication.

requirement_status_groups.name: final_machine_status
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The fixture now reproduces exactly in a clean temporary directory and has a lock-bound SBOM, while clean_room_reproduction_passed remains false. The current status is not the final 95-requirement release disposition.

requirement_status_groups.name: human_ui_of_choice_evidence
requirement_status_groups.qualification: No participant-study authority was supplied. The UI-of-choice claim must remain not_yet_testable.

task_status_groups.qualification: An implementation or design artefact exists; task promotion and release acceptance are not implied.

The repository-wide and remediation-diff Codex Security scans are documented, all 17 reported findings are remediated through commit 27890dc, and 32 focused post-fix tests pass. This does not satisfy the eventual full-corpus release-snapshot security gate; a distinct final-snapshot terminal must supersede the existing pre-release security terminal.
The task's declared promotion gate has not been satisfied.
Human research requires ethics, recruitment, consent, accommodation and participant-data authority.
